# Analysis

This chapter includes a figure.

```{r}
#| label: fig-book-cars
#| fig-cap: "Speed and stopping distance from the cars dataset."
#| echo: false

plot(cars$speed, cars$dist,
     xlab = "Speed",
     ylab = "Stopping distance",
     pch = 19,
     col = "#1f77b4")
```

See @fig-book-cars.
